themes.exampleQuote: Put it on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
The best thing I've ever put in my mouth hands down.
Please do not miss this hidden gem in Pittsburgh.
Gluten free made with almond flour.

notable_quote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers arrive looking for a neighborhood bakery and leave writing about Paris; the raspberry lychee macaron is the specific product pulling the most passionate language, and at 525 reviews with an 88% five-star rate, there is almost no visible friction in the record.
quarter_narrative: Thirteen Pittsburgh creators posted 15 TikToks at La Gourmandine Hazelwood this quarter, generating nearly 737,000 plays, and the bakery posted nothing back. The account has been quiet for over 40 days while @lesegotamar alone pulled 459,100 plays in a single visit. That gap is the defining editorial fact of this ranking cycle: La Gourmandine sits first among Pittsburgh pastry shops on the strength of its reviews and a city that will not stop filming it, while the Pittsburgh Sweets family leader, Page's, holds the top of the broader category on social momentum the bakery isn't currently matching. A return to consistent posting, even modest, would close the distance between where this business ranks and where the data says it could go.
tldr_read: Near-perfect reviews, 737K TikTok plays from other people's accounts, and a feed that has been quiet for 41 days: Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Pastry Shops.
tldr_meaning: The review and creator signals are already operating at a high level; the rank climbs when the bakery's own Instagram reactivates and begins capturing an audience that is clearly ready to follow.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Pastry, Carried By 737K Plays It Did Not Post.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before the next weekend
playbook.action: The account has been silent for 41 days; even one post per week of the pastry case would reopen the momentum signal.

playbook.headline: Repost one of the 13 creator videos
playbook.action: Thirteen creators produced 737K plays this quarter; sharing even one to Stories costs nothing and captures documented reach.

playbook.headline: Name the raspberry lychee macaron in photos
playbook.action: It is the most cited product by name in reviews; a labeled photo pinned to the top of the feed converts curiosity into a trip.
